_comment: Curated People-Also-Ask questions per topic cluster (from live SERPs). content_retrofit merges these with harvested data/processed/paa_snapshots.json questions and answers them in expansion sections. Cluster key must appear in the article handle or title (case-insensitive).
anti-fog: Are there any glasses that don't fog up?
photochromic: What are the best photochromic cycling glasses?
lens: Why do cyclists wear yellow glasses?
oakley: Are Shady Rays as good as Oakley?
Are Oakleys made in China now?
What glasses are on trend in 2026?
What glasses are hot right now?
What sunglasses do navy seals use?
